---
title: "Text Classification with Neural Networks"
description: "Using CNN and RNN networks to predict positive and negative sentiment scores of IMDb movie reviews"
author: "Jonas Reger"
date: "10/16/2022"
categories: [machine learning, neural network, natural language processing, python]
draft: true
freeze: true
format:
  html:
    include-after-body: ''
    page-layout: full
page-layout: full
---
